options.name: <port_list>
options.description: List of ports for which the slew time is specified

options.name: -fall
options.description: Slew time should be applied to the falling edge of the signal (data or clock)

options.name: -max
options.description: Slew times are with respect to the late (setup) time check of the data signal

options.name: -min
options.description: Slew times are with respect to the early (hold) time check of the data signal

options.name: -rise
options.description: Slew time should be applied to the rising edge of the signal (data or clock)
